---
title: "absolute_genetic_load"
author: "subhash"
date: "2026-02-04"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap')) 
```

# calculating of absolute genetic load for ease of understanding

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)

outdir <- "data/3.1_genetic_load_sorghum/"

files <- list.files(outdir, pattern = "miss50_chr", full.names = TRUE)
if (!length(files)) files <- list.files(outdir, pattern = "miss50", full.names = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(files) > 0)

dt <- rbindlist(lapply(files, fread), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# cutoff 
if (all(na.omit(unique(dt$cutoff)) %in% c(1, 5, 10))) dt[, cutoff := cutoff/100]
dt <- dt[cutoff %in% c(0.01, 0.05, 0.10)]
dt <- dt[!is.na(Genetic_load) & !is.na(sub)]

# factor orders
dt[, sub := factor(sub, levels = c("wild", "landrace", "improved"))]
dt[, cutoff_fac := factor(cutoff,
                          levels = c(0.01, 0.05, 0.10),
                          labels = c("1%", "5%", "10%"))]

#calculate absolute genetic load
dt[, Genetic_load_abs := abs(Genetic_load)]

cols <- c(
  wild     = "#1B9E77",
  landrace = "#D95F02",
  improved = "#7570B3"
)

comparisons <- list(c("wild","landrace"), c("wild","improved"), c("landrace","improved"))

p_abs <- ggplot(dt, aes(x = sub, y = Genetic_load_abs, fill = sub)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.65, outlier.size = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ cutoff_fac, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = comparisons,
                     method = "wilcox.test",
                     label = "p.signif",
                     hide.ns = TRUE,
                     tip.length = 0.01,
                     size = 4.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Genetic load (absolute) at 1%, 5% and 10% cutoffs (missing <= 50%)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Absolute genetic load",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
p_abs
ggsave("graphs/01_publication/3.genetic_load/Abs_GenLoad_sorghum_miss50.pdf", p_abs, width = 10, height = 3.2, units = "in")

```
